name_en: Quartier de la Gare / Train Station Area

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the train station is
phrases.cultural_note: Dijon's train station (Gare de Dijon) is on the north side of the city, about a 10-minute walk from the historic center.

responses.english: It is located five minutes away on foot, straight ahead on this avenue.
responses.phonetic: say par lah, zhoost oh boo duh lah roo
responses.local: Prenez le tramway ligne 1 (direction 'Quetigny Centre') et descendez à l'arrêt 'Darcy'.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about getting to the wine region from here
phrases.text_local: Comment aller dans la région viticole depuis ici ?
phrases.pronunciation: koh-MAHN ah-LAY dan lah ray-ZHYON vee-tee-KOL duh-PWEE ee-SEE
phrases.cultural_note: The Burgundy wine region (Côte d'Or) is easily reached by train from Dijon. Beaune is 30 minutes away by TER regional train.

responses.english: I advise you to rent a car, the vineyards are about 30 minutes south via highway A10.
responses.phonetic: voo poo-VAY ee ah-LAY ahn trahn, ahn vwah-TUR oo ah-VEK oon eks-kur-SYON
responses.local: Le tramway ligne 1 dessert les principaux sites touristiques en 10 minutes.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there's luggage storage at the station
phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il une consigne à la gare ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee ah-TEEL oon kohn-SEE-nyah lah GAR
phrases.cultural_note: The station has luggage storage (consigne) — useful for day trips to wine country. Prices are around €5-10 per piece per day.

responses.english: Yes, there are automatic lockers on the ground floor, near exit B. Count about 6 euros for 24 hours.
responses.phonetic: wee, suh-LAH ruh-MON-tah oon pay-ree-OHD ahn-SYEN
responses.local: Oui, la gare dispose d'une consigne automatique. Les tarifs varient entre 5 et 10 euros par bagage et par jour, idéale pour vos excursions.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the tramway in the city
phrases.text_local: Pouvez-vous me parler du tramway de la ville ?
phrases.pronunciation: poo-VAY voo muh par-LAY doo tram-WAY duh lah VEEL
phrases.cultural_note: Dijon has a modern tramway (T1 and T2) that connects the station to the city center and beyond. It's the easiest way to get around.

responses.english: Of course, the tramway serves the entire city center from 5:30 AM to 12:30 AM. A ticket costs €1.90 and can be purchased at the vending machines on the platforms.
responses.local: Oui, bien sûr. Le tramway de Dijon a deux lignes, T1 et T2. Elles relient la gare au centre-ville et aux principaux quartiers résidentiels et universitaires.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about parking near the station
phrases.text_local: Où peut-on garer près de la gare ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo puh-TOH gar-AY preh duh lah GAR
phrases.cultural_note: There's a large parking lot (Park & Ride) near the station with affordable daily rates. It's convenient if you're arriving by car.

responses.english: There's a large parking lot (Park & Ride) near the station with affordable daily rates. It's convenient if you're arriving by car.
responses.phonetic: luh par-KING eh soo luh bah-tee-MAHN
responses.local: Il y a un grand parking (Park & Ride) près de la gare avec des tarifs journaliers abordables. C'est pratique si vous arrivez en voiture.
